topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: On page load the Pending Reviews panel should list pending items or show zero pending; instead the browser console shows GET /api/reviews 404 (Not Found) followed by SyntaxError: Unexpected token "<", "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON.

public/index.html loadPendingReviews (line 3461) fetches /api/reviews; src/App.js registers GET /api/reviews at lines 198-199 and implements #onGetReviews at line 1467; Express static middleware is mounted on / at line 128 inside ENABLE_UI block.

Route exists in source but runtime returns HTML 404; possible causes include stale deployed image, reverse proxy misrouting, static middleware ordering, or the API route being shadowed. Must not affect other /api/* endpoints or UI panels.

curl GET https://categorizer.omniflow.cc/api/reviews must return HTTP 200 JSON {success:true,reviews:[...]} or a structured {success:false,error:"..."}; loadPendingReviews must not throw SyntaxError on a structured error; browser console must not show 404 on page load when endpoint is healthy.
BUG-0002 acceptance rows pass; the Pending Reviews panel loads on page load without console errors on a healthy deployment.

bug_summary: GET /api/reviews returns HTTP 404 HTML on admin UI page load, causing loadPendingReviews JSON parse error

operator_report.secondary_error: (index):3472 Error loading reviews: SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE ..." is not valid JSON
operator_report.trigger: page load / right at the start
